creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text:
At this point re@ has been sitting on a request to merge the fix as an errata 
(along with several other fixes) since the day 6.2 was released.  Considering 
that the 6.3 cycle is schedule to begin soon and that re@ is already busy 
with the 7.0 cycle (and soon 6.3), I strongly doubt that this patch (or any 
of the others) will be merged as errata fixes to the 6.2 branch.  At this 
point you should either apply the patch directly to your machine, run 
RELENG_6, or wait for 6.3.

-- 
John Baldwin
